seoTitle: Change Your QuickBooks Account Email Address
metaDescription: Update the email address tied to your QuickBooks Online login and Intuit account, including verification and customer-facing settings.
intro: Your QuickBooks login email connects to your entire Intuit account, so changing it takes a quick verification step. This guide shows how to update your sign-in email in QuickBooks Online and confirm invoices still route from the right address.

steps.heading: Open your account hub
steps.body: Click your profile icon in the top right corner and select Manage your Intuit Account.

steps.heading: Go to sign-in and security
steps.body: On the account management panel, click Sign in & security to find your email settings.

steps.heading: Update the email field
steps.body: Click the Email Address row, delete the outdated address, and enter your new business email.

steps.heading: Verify your identity
steps.body: Enter your current password to re-authenticate, then click Save to trigger the verification request.

steps.heading: Confirm the new address
steps.body: Open your new inbox, copy the activation code, and enter it on the Intuit security page to complete the change.

faq.question: Does changing my email affect my company data?
faq.answer: No, updating your sign-in email only changes your login credential and doesn't touch your company file or transactions.

faq.question: Do I need to verify the new email address?
faq.answer: Yes, QuickBooks sends a one-time activation code to the new inbox that you must enter to confirm the change.

faq.question: Will invoices still send from my old email?
faq.answer: You should check your Company settings after the change to make sure customer-facing forms like invoices reflect the new address.

faq.question: What if I don't have access to my old email anymore?
faq.answer: You may need to go through Intuit's account recovery process if you can't verify with your old login email.
